coords.lm1: navigate       {coord} вЂ” t1 views task, p3 views pipeline, d5-d8 range
coords.lm2: edit-field     e1{coord} {f} {v} вЂ” set field by number (e.g. e1t3 status done)
coords.lm3: edit-body      e1{coord} B+ {text} вЂ” B replaces, B+ appends, B5 line 5, B.Section heading
coords.lm4: create         e2 {ns} "title" вЂ” create in namespace (e.g. e2 t "fix bug")
coords.lm5: extend-ns      e3 {ns}.{sub} вЂ” register new sub-namespace
coords.lm6: orchestrate    e0 вЂ” sweep pipelines, check gates, auto-kick
coords.lm7: launch         e0 t{n} вЂ” launch pipeline from task (auto-create + dispatch)
coords.lm8: pipe-status    e0 p{n} вЂ” pipeline state, or e0 p{n} archive/complete/block
coords.lm9: pipe-list      e0 l вЂ” list all pipelines with current states
coords.lm10: diff           .d вЂ” what changed since last .a anchor
coords.lm11: anchor         .a вЂ” reset diff baseline to now
coords.lm12: filter-tag     --tag {t} вЂ” supermap filtered to tag
coords.lm13: filter-since   --since {d} вЂ” only entries from last {d} days
coords.lm15: mem-search     memory_search("{q}") вЂ” semantic search over memory
coords.lm16: spawn-agent    sessions_spawn(...) вЂ” launch sub-agent session
coords.lm17: shell          exec {cmd} вЂ” run shell command
